Fast, Trackable Deliveries Across Lagos

From Yaba to Lekki, Ikeja to Ajah — we keep every Lagos delivery trackable in real time.

Request a Pickup

How it works

1

Book a Pickup

Provide pickup and delivery details.

2

We Handle the Delivery

A rider picks up and moves your package.

3

Track in Real Time

Receive live status updates until delivery.

Real-Time Delivery Updates

Every delivery is tracked through clear status updates, so you always know what's happening.

Order Created
Picked Up
In Transit
Out for Delivery
Delivered

Why Meenarh Logistics

Real-time package tracking

Know where your package is at every moment.

Event-based delivery status updates

Get notified at every stage of delivery.

Lagos-focused operations

Built specifically for Lagos delivery needs.

Reliable and transparent process

No hidden fees, no surprises.

What Early Customers Are Saying

Feedback from pilot deliveries across Lagos.

The tracking updates made it easy to know exactly where my package was. No stress.

Small business owner, Yaba

Pickup was smooth and delivery happened faster than I expected.

Online seller, Lekki

I liked that I didn't have to keep calling the rider. The status updates were clear.
